introSection: Dinoconda (Chinese: 过山龙) is a steel 4th Dimension roller coaster located at China Dinosaurs Park in Xinbei, Changzhou, Jiangsu, China. The ride was built by the Qi Guang Group and was designed by Alan Schilke and S&S Worldwide. The control system was provided by Birket Engineering, Inc.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Red track, dark green supports. The control system was supplied by Control system: Birket Engineering, Inc.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars spin riders forwards and backwards, controlled via additional rails on the track. Each car sits four riders across - two at either side of the track.

fullText:
Dinoconda (Chinese: 过山龙) is a steel 4th Dimension roller coaster located at China Dinosaurs Park in Xinbei, Changzhou, Jiangsu, China. The ride was built by the Qi Guang Group and was designed by Alan Schilke and S&S Worldwide. The control system was provided by Birket Engineering, Inc.

Red track, dark green supports. The control system was supplied by Control system: Birket Engineering, Inc.

The cars spin riders forwards and backwards, controlled via additional rails on the track. Each car sits four riders across - two at either side of the track.
